title: aronia × spuria
intro: Aronia × spuria, also known as the Aronia or Chokeberry, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of two Aronia species, Aronia arbutifolia and Aronia × prunifolia. This plant is valued for its dark purple berries, which possess medicinal properties due to their high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Aronia × spuria berries include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as potential cardiovascular and immune system support. Aronia × spuria berries can be used in various herbal preparations, such as juices, teas, and supplements, to harness their medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
